scripts.deploy: npm run build && wrangler pages deploy dist --project-name meetup-korea
scripts.setup:kv: npx wrangler kv namespace create meetup_KV
scripts.secret:kakao: npx wrangler pages secret put KAKAO_MAP_KEY --project-name meetup-korea
scripts.secret:odsay: npx wrangler pages secret put ODSAY_API_KEY --project-name meetup-korea
scripts.secret:list: npx wrangler pages secret list --project-name meetup-korea
